case_title: HARKIRAT SINGH BATTH VS. MEENAKSHI D. SINGH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-10-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-29-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-14-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, MEENAKSHI D.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION RE NONE SERVICE FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BATTH, HARKIRAT SINGH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGH, MEENAKSHI D. $5,980.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,110.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PLAINTIFF'S LOSS OF USE AND SUPPLEMENTAL PROPERTY LOSS; AND THE JUDGMENT SHALL NOT BE OFFSET BY DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUS PAYMENT FOR THE VALUE OF THE PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE.
